# NSLOOKUP(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  nslookup — query internet name servers interactively

## SYNOPSIS
  nslookup <hostname>

## DESCRIPTION
Alias for dig. Resolves a hostname to its IP address.

## EXAMPLES
  nslookup nexus.corp
  nslookup chimera-control

## SEE ALSO
  dig, whois
